prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical smartphone photo of a young East Asian woman factory technician with a short dark-brown bob haircut and wispy bangs seated at an industrial assembly workstation, viewed from a slightly high wide-angle perspective as she turns her head up to look directly into the camera with large expressive eyes. She wears exactly 3 visible protective/work items: a navy-blue zip-front work uniform jacket, a light-blue disposable surgical face mask, and bright blue nitrile gloves on both hands. Her hands are positioned at the right side of the frame, handling small shiny cylindrical metal components on a stainless-steel roller conveyor or inspection rail. The setting is a clean modern factory line with metal frames, rails, machinery, bolts, rollers, green flooring, fluorescent overhead lights, and cool gray industrial surfaces; keep the background detailed but slightly softened by depth of field. Use soft bright overhead lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, mild lens distortion from a close phone camera, cool teal-blue color grading, and a candid documentary feel. Include exactly 2 small visible watermark-style text marks: a rounded translucent label in the top-left reading AI生成, and a white logo/text mark in the bottom-right reading 即梦AI. No extra people, no extra text, no cartoon styling, no glamour studio lighting.
